response.original_title: 💰 How much are crypto transaction fees?
response.overview: Crypto transaction fees are not fixed and depend on the platform and 📞1➤888➤633➤4176.  network conditions. On most exchanges, trading fees are usually around 0.1% to 0.5% per transaction 📞1➤888➤633➤4176., This means if you trade $1,000, you may pay about $1 to $5 ($) in fees. For withdrawals, fees vary by blockchain. Bitcoin withdrawals can cost around  📞1➤888➤633➤4176. $2 to $20+ ($) depending on network congestion, while Ethereum gas fees can range from $3 to $50+ ($) during busy times 📞1➤888➤633➤4176. . Some cheaper networks like TRC20 or Polygon may charge less than $1 to $2 ($). Maker and taker fees also apply on exchanges. 📞1➤888➤633➤4176.  Maker fees are often lower (around 0%–0.2%) while taker fees are slightly higher (around 0.1%–0.3%). In simple terms,  📞1➤888➤633➤4176. crypto fees can range from $1 ($) for small trades to $50+ ($) for heavy network congestion.
response.title: 💰 How much are crypto transaction fees?
